title: Fan into flame; not ashamed
summary_text: Paul to beloved child Timothy—grace mercy peace. Stir up gift God gave; spirit not fear but power love discipline. Not ashamed testimony Lord or Paul prisoner—join suffering gospel according power God saved us holy calling before times eternal.
key_points: I remind you to stir up the gift of God which is in you.
For God didn’t give us a spirit of fear, but of power, love, and self-control.
Don’t be ashamed of the testimony of our Lord.
who saved us, and called us with a holy calling.
Grace … was given to us in Christ Jesus before times eternal.
evidence_phrases: stir up the gift of God
God didn’t give us a spirit of fear
Don’t be ashamed of the testimony
called us with a holy calling

title: Strong in grace; approved workman; vessel honor
summary_text: Be strong in grace Christ Jesus; faithful men teach others. Endure hardship good soldier—please enlisting officer. Athlete crowned if competes lawfully. Farmer first partake. Rightly divide word truth; shun profane babblings; vessel honor sanctified.
key_points: You therefore must endure hardship as a good soldier of Christ Jesus.
The things which you heard from me … commit to faithful men.
Give diligence to present yourself approved by God, a workman who doesn’t need to be ashamed.
shun empty chatter, for it will go further in ungodliness.
If anyone cleanses himself from these, he will be a vessel for honor.
evidence_phrases: rightly dividing the word of truth

title: Last days perilous; Scripture inspired
summary_text: Know last days perilous times—lovers self money proud without natural affection. Evil impostors wax worse—continue Scripture you learned; sacred writings make wise salvation; all Scripture God-breathed complete man God.
key_points: Know this, that in the last days, grievous times will come.
Evil men and impostors will grow worse and worse.
Continue in the things which you have learned.
From infancy, you have known the holy Scriptures.
Every Scripture is God-breathed.
complete, thoroughly equipped for every good work.
evidence_phrases: Continue in the things which you have learned
thoroughly equipped for every good work

title: Preach word; crown righteousness
summary_text: Preach word urgent season out season; reprove rebuke exhort patience doctrine. Time not endure sound doctrine—itching ears. Be sober endure afflictions do work evangelist discharge ministry. Crown righteousness laid up—Lord righteous judge.
key_points: preach the word! Be urgent in season and out of season.
they will heap up for themselves teachers after their own lusts.
always be sober-minded, endure suffering, do the work of an evangelist.
I have finished the course, I have kept the faith.
There is laid up for me the crown of righteousness.
evidence_phrases: they will turn their ears away from the truth
do the work of an evangelist
